; Fixture phase 2. Install only after human-reviewed visual/stability confirmation.
; Chiappa/Ferrari fixture source SHA-256: 095e19d24d23ee8d2cbc67f9a08d3af5a13e27644eb7a361fb6d0aa10f136c4e
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[2857280009207495592]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad 1.0
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]#[[8400129135001204805]] > [[7712155293725601]][.[[214634455770]]=`toolbarProvider.editingTools`] > [[454089850271038938]]#lettersHomeLauncher
        REPLACE [[254542236275632405]] WITH {
            ~&254542236275632405&~: AppLoadLauncher.launchApplication("letters-home", [], {}, false)
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
